lines: Almost 6 months of showing up every day just to earn your yes. I never stopped after that. Not once in 4 years.
And then someone who called themselves my friend took all of that and burned it down. I trusted him the same way I trusted you and somehow that still surprises me.
I forgive you. I want to be clear about that. Not because what happened was okay but because I am not built to hold something like this against you for the rest of my life.
But forgiving you and coming back are two different things and I think you know that.
4 years is not nothing. Almost 5 if you count every day before you even said yes. I know what we had was real. That is exactly why I cannot just walk back in like it did not happen.
Part of me still waits. I will not lie about that. Part of me still thinks one day you are going to show up and it is going to make sense again. I do not know how to turn that off.
But I am not coming back to something that already left me once. Even if I still love you. Even if I probably always will a little.
I hope you are okay. I genuinely do. Just from a distance this time.
sign: I forgive you, just not coming back, Kiel
